---
title: "Life Expectancy and Population"
---

This page analyzes the relationship between life expectancy and population in the Gapminder dataset.

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: true
#| fig-cap: "Life expectancy vs population"
#| label: fig-life-pop

import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

df = pd.read_csv("gapminder.csv")

plt.scatter(df["population_millions"], df["life_expectancy"], alpha=0.5)
plt.xlabel("Population (millions)")
plt.ylabel("Life expectancy")
plt.title("Life Expectancy vs Population")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

As shown in @fig-life-pop, population size alone does not determine life expectancy.
